input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.2.4
            TITLE: all forward facing edges on the bodywork that could contact people, including the nose, must

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.2.4: All forward facing edges on the Bodywork that could contact people, including the nose, must
T.7.2.4 All forward facing edges on the Bodywork that could contact people, including the nose, must 
have forward facing radii minimum 38 mm. This minimum radius must extend 45° or more 
relative to the forward direction, along the top, sides and bottom of all affected edges.

final_answer: All forward facing edges on the Bodywork that could contact people, including the nose, must have forward facing radii minimum 38 mm. This minimum radius must extend 45° or more relative to the forward direction, along the top, sides and bottom of all affected edges.
